headline: 5 Stocks to Watch From the Prospering Securities & Exchanges Industry
summary: Zacks Securities and Exchanges industry players like SPGI, CME, ICE, NDAQ and CBOE gain from rising crypto adoption, trading volumes, a higher non-trading revenue base and tech investments.
